subject: fix(export): use exact pixel dimensions for PDF page size
body:
Use platform dimensions (e.g. 1080x1080, 1080x1350) in @page size
instead of generic landscape/portrait paper sizes. Prevents letterboxing
on LinkedIn carousels where non-standard aspect ratios would get white
bars from A4/Letter page mapping.

Tags: export, pdf, linkedin
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: export-improvements
Semver: patch
